channel.title: Looking Glass
channel.description: Looking Glass — local AI research companion. Update feed.

item.description:
Looking Glass 0.3.0

Projects are now a real working surface — Alice understands the folder she's in, and remembers across conversations.

  • Project awareness: in a project, Alice knows its name, description, and folder, and scopes file/shell tools to it
  • Memory: save notes to a project's memory-bank — conversationally ("remember that…") or with a per-message "Save to memory" button — and recall them in later chats
  • Per-project default model and an "Auto" model picker
  • Sidecar lifecycle: clean shutdown on quit, stale-process cleanup on launch, and a keep_alive setting so models free memory on their own
  • Polish: right-aligned message actions, clearer Ollama error messages

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.2.0

  • Persistence & Projects: conversation history (SQLite + full-text search), folder-bound Projects, rename/delete chats
  • Selectable chat font with sans + monospace pairing (Settings → Appearance → Chat Font)
  • GitHub-flavored markdown rendering — headings, blockquotes, tables, task lists
  • New app icon; contrast/elevation polish across bubbles, cards, and the sidebar
  • ⌘, opens Settings

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.1.0

First release. Native SwiftUI chat with Alice, running locally on Ollama.

  • Streaming chat with a glass UI (rail + collapsible sidebar, light/dark, Wonderland theme)
  • 9 built-in tools: file ops, shell, web search, calculator, pdf extract, and more
  • Multi-turn agent loop with inline tool-call cards
  • Markdown rendering, monospace fonts, adjustable line height
  • Configurable Ollama URL, per-tool toggles, custom avatar, editable system prompt

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.
